sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34183" key="e)mmote/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμμοτέω</orth>, <sense id="n34183.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plug, stop</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σωλῆνας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:2:384D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.384D.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
